employeeDetailsSubtitle: Please fill in your details before starting the defect test

instructions.objectiveText: Arrange all SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) steps in the correct sequence within the time limit of 60 seconds.
instructions.shuffledText: At the top section of the screen, you'll see all 12 steps shuffled in random order. These are the steps you need to arrange.
instructions.selectingText: Tap on a step in the top section to add it to the bottom section. The steps should be selected in the correct sequence from Step 1 to Step 12.
instructions.correctText: If you place a step in the correct position, its border will turn green. The game continues and you can select the next step.
instructions.incorrectText: If you place a step in the wrong position, the border will turn red, the device will vibrate, and a message will appear. The step will return to the available steps pool.
instructions.timeText: You have 60 seconds to complete the sequence. The timer circle at the top right shows your remaining time. As time decreases, the timer color changes from green to orange to red.
instructions.performanceText: Your performance is scored based on time taken, accuracy (fewer misplacements), and speed (how quickly you place each step correctly).
instructions.winningText: Successfully arrange all 12 steps in the correct order to win. You'll see a results screen with your performance statistics.

snackbarCorrectMain: Correct! Now arrange the sub-steps for this procedure.
snackbarCorrectSub: Sub-steps correct! Continue with next main step.
timeUpMessage: Your time has expired. Try again!
navigationErrorMessage: Could not navigate to results screen. Please try again.
employeeFormError: Please fill all the fields and capture a photo
employeeCodeInvalid: Employee code must contain only numbers
cameraPermissionMessage: App needs access to your camera
cameraPermissionError: An error occurred while requesting camera permission
instruction1: You will see a random hazard zone highlighted.
instruction2: Tap the highlighted hazard zone to confirm.
instruction3: After hazard confirmation, three exits will blink.
instruction4: Choose the nearest exit for safe evacuation.
instruction5: You have only 3 attempts for the whole training.
instruction6: Your score depends on correct hazard & nearest exit.
instruction7: At the end, your performance will be saved.
completeTest: Complete a test to see results here.
